hero.subtitle: Upload your past writings, extract your unique Style DNA, and generate content that truly sounds like you.

features.title: Three Steps to Your
features.subtitle: Clone your writing style in minutes. No technical knowledge required.

step1.title: Feed Your Articles
step1.description: Upload your past writings via URL, file, or paste text. We support multiple formats and sources.

step2.title: Extract Style DNA
step2.description: Our AI analyzes your writing to understand your tone, structure, vocabulary, and unique quirks.

step3.title: Generate Content
step3.description: Create new content that matches your writing style perfectly. Blog posts, emails, social media, and more.

howItWorks.title: See It In Action
howItWorks.subtitle: Your AI twin learns your voice and writes content that sounds authentically you.

upload.title: Upload Content
upload.description: Upload your articles, blogs or writing samples

analyze.title: Style Analysis
analyze.description: AI learns your writing style automatically

generate.title: Content Generation
generate.description: Generate new content matching your style

howItWorks.switchHint: Switch scenarios to see how AI adapts to your style

blog.title: Blog Post
blog.input: Write about the future of remote work

email.title: Email
email.input: Follow up on the product demo meeting

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade anytime. All plans include core features.
pricing.note: Pro and Enterprise plans include platform tokens, no API key needed.
pricing.note2: All data transfers are encrypted, keys stored securely.

auth.title: Twins
auth.subtitle: Sign in to access your AI writing twin

error.title: Authentication Error
error.description: Something went wrong during authentication. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Train your AI writing twin and generate content in your unique style.

step1.title: Step 1: Feed Your Articles
step1.description: Upload your past writings to train your AI writing twin. Add at least 3 articles for best results.
step1.selectFiles: Drag & drop files here, or click to select

step2.title: Step 2: Extract Style DNA
step2.description: Our AI analyzes your writing to understand your unique voice, tone, and style patterns.
step2.uploadHint: Add at least 1 article to extract your style

step3.title: Step 3: Generate Content
step3.description: Enter a topic and let your AI writing twin create content in your unique style.
step3.topicPlaceholder: E.g., Write about the future of AI in healthcare...
step3.extractHint: Complete Step 2 to generate content in your style

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your API keys for AI content generation.
settings.platformProvidersDescription: AI Providers provided by the platform, available to all users
settings.apiKeysDescription: Your API keys are encrypted and stored securely. We never expose them to the frontend.
settings.apiKeysUpgradeRequired: Upgrade to Pro or Enterprise to add your own API Key
settings.upgradeForApiKeys: Upgrade your plan to use your own API Key
settings.whyNeedKey: Why do I need an API key?
settings.keyExplanation: Twins uses your own API keys to generate content. This means you have full control over costs and usage. You'll be billed directly by OpenAI or Anthropic based on your usage. We never store your keys in plain text.

errors.noArticles: No articles found. Please upload some articles first.
errors.noApiKey: No API key configured. Please add your API key in settings.
errors.noStyleProfile: No style profile found. Please analyze your writing style first.
